titleZh: 《公司法》2018与2023修订对比实务指南
titleEn: Practical Guide Comparing the 2018 and 2023 Company Law
abstractZh: 按条款和制度模块对比2018版与2023修订版《公司法》，便于实务中快速判断新旧规则替代关系、过渡安排与风险点。
abstractEn: A practical chapter-style comparison between the 2018 and 2023 regimes, focused on capital obligations, shareholder rights, and governance architecture.
